title: Verify exact window metric reconciliation
preconditions: Coherent fixtures cover Budgeted, Zero Budget, Unbudgeted, Uncategorized, no-plan, no-actual, positive, zero, negative refund, maximum, and overflow values.
steps: Calculate all requested day, week, and month-to-date totals and category buckets; permute member order; reconcile against cited Budget Position; inject overflow and mismatch.
expected: Every item is accounted for once, signed exact totals and zero semantics hold, ordering is stable, and overflow or mismatch produces no partial report.
